name: Earthshaker
notes: The highest damage in the game, and it's splash damage. But the low attack speed and movement speed make it balanced. It can't hit Air, and it has a penalty vs. Structure and Defensive (0.6x and 0.8x respectively) to make it less of a base-cracker than the Granite Crumbler, which is the other heavy-tier siege tank. It has a smaller squad size than the Crumbler (2 vs. 4) to make it more vulnerable to Infantry swarms.
